response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel source modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Proven ability to work in cross-functional teams and build CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX environments
No demonstrated knowledge of embedded network security protocols or switch firmware
No Japanese language proficiency, a mandatory requirement

key_factors.factor: Lack of Linux kernel or switch firmware exposure
